creator: paul@aps.org
text:
- Update to 1.8.0
 
 Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 
> How-To-Repeat:
> Fix:
 
 --- radmind-1.8.0.patch begins here ---
 diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/Makefile /usr/ 
 home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/Makefile	Thu Dec 21 17:13:50 2006
 +++ /usr/home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/Makefile	Tue Mar 13  
 12:40:11 2007
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
   #
 
   PORTNAME=	radmind
 -PORTVERSION=	1.7.2
 +PORTVERSION=	1.8.0
   CATEGORIES=	sysutils
   MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
   MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 @@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
   CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX} --with-radminddir=$ 
 {RADMIND_BASE_DIR}
 
   MAN1=		fsdiff.1 ktcheck.1 lapply.1 lcksum.1 lcreate.1 lfdiff.1 \
 -		lmerge.1 lsort.1 twhich.1 rash.1
 +		lmerge.1 lsort.1 twhich.1 rash.1 repo.1
   MAN5=		applefile.5
   MAN8=		radmind.8
   DOCS=		COPYRIGHT README SPEC
 diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/distinfo /usr/ 
 home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/distinfo
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/distinfo	Thu Dec 21 17:13:50 2006
 +++ /usr/home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/distinfo	Tue Mar 13  
 12:39:26 2007
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (radmind-1.7.2.tar.gz) = 553cb6b2c00520a6355d696bea81121c
 -SHA256 (radmind-1.7.2.tar.gz) =  
 84ebcfc1732cea42f54dfa8211bcf7519099fa364a1409b027ba1aeb7f03217a
 -SIZE (radmind-1.7.2.tar.gz) = 382475
 +MD5 (radmind-1.8.0.tar.gz) = 90073597cb7a04c42da759a9d0628229
 +SHA256 (radmind-1.8.0.tar.gz) =  
 a1da20c93a4e157b02e1ca487c9db158f33796b24c4fe79affdffa6b410b5701
 +SIZE (radmind-1.8.0.tar.gz) = 387738
 diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/pkg-plist /usr/ 
 home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/pkg-plist
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/radmind/pkg-plist	Mon Oct  9 03:47:59 2006
 +++ /usr/home/paul/myports/sysutils/radmind/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 13  
 12:41:33 2007
 @@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
   bin/lmerge
   bin/lsort
   bin/ra.sh
 +bin/repo
   bin/twhich
   sbin/radmind
   %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/COPYRIGHT
 --- radmind-1.8.0.patch ends here ---
